findings.issue: RESOLVED-as-deletion + residual observation: the v1 false-green UnknownVerb.test.goal was deleted (correct). The confidence-per-step (P6) feature now has no automated test in either suite; it is verified only by human observation of '⚠ planner VeryLow' in CLI build output.
findings.impact: A P6 emission regression would not be caught by the suite.
findings.suggestion: Optional follow-up: drive the confidence renderer from a fixture/mock plan (decoupled from the live LLM) and assert the rendered warning line. Not a blocker.

findings.issue: F4 deferred: network-dependent Http tests redden/timeout when the gateway is down. All passed this run.
findings.impact: Suite flakes on network conditions, unrelated to branch code.
findings.suggestion: Separate ticket: mock transport or integration-only tag.

findings.issue: F5 deferred: interactive y/n/a prompt leaks to console during the C# run.
findings.impact: Could hang in a non-interactive CI without a TTY.
findings.suggestion: Separate ticket: supply a redirected auto-deny input channel for the gate test.

summary: Re-test of coder v2. All three actionable v1 findings resolved and independently verified: F1 false-green deleted; F2 cache test now asserts per-key reference identity (C# 3377/3377, flake gone); F3 added an end-to-end goal-channel-recursion test, mutation-confirmed it catches the guard (Expected ChannelNotFound / Actual CallStackOverflow when _executing.Value=true is removed). Both suites green from a clean rebuild, no builder action-mismatch. F4/F5 deferred as environmental/hygiene. PASS.
